inputs.titre: Création de l'Académie des Inscriptions et Belles-Lettres

reason: The image depicts a gathering in a grand hall, likely representing the Académie des Inscriptions et Belles-Lettres. The architecture, clothing (justacorps, waistcoats, cravats), and furnishings align with the general aesthetic of the 17th century. There are no overt modern objects or fantastical elements present. However, the presence of women within the meeting is less likely to have occurred when the academy was initially created, which brings doubt to the accuracy of the image.
